---
title: Starting Off
author: Hersh
date: '2020-11-17'
slug: first-post
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This is the first of what I hope are many more posts where I integrate my stats, programming, and policy background into something tangible. 

I built this website using [`@yihui's`](https://yihui.org/en/) excellent [`blogdown`](https://bookdown.org/) tutorial. The template I'm using for this site comes from [`@adityatelange`](https://github.com/adityatelange/hugo-PaperMod).

I'll be using this site as a space to post occasional writing and code around policy, politics and other things.
